name: Graham Holdings Co
summary: Graham Holdings Company is a diversified holding company with operations spanning educational services (via Kaplan, Inc.), television broadcasting (seven stations), healthcare (specialty pharmacy, home health, hospice, applied behavior analysis, allergy/asthma physician services, aesthetics, and SaaS), manufacturing (commercial building products, electrical solutions, lifting solutions, utility parts), automotive dealerships (eight dealerships), restaurants, custom framing, marketing solutions, media publications including Slate and Foreign Policy magazines, and podcast/audio monetization platforms.

products.name: Kaplan International
products.description: Educational services including pathways, language training, professional certifications, and higher education across Europe, Middle East, Asia Pacific, and North America.

products.name: Kaplan Higher Education (KHE)
products.description: Managed non-academic services including analytics, marketing, advising, and admissions support for online university programs.

products.name: Kaplan Supplemental Education (SE)
products.description: Exam preparation, professional licensure, certification, and continuing education for students and professionals in North America.

products.name: Kaplan Assessments / SQE
products.description: Sole authorized assessment provider for the Solicitors Qualifying Examination (SQE) in England and Wales.

products.name: Ontrack
products.description: Continuing professional development platform offering tailored corporate short courses and continuing education with approximately 48,700 subscribers.

products.name: Prelum
products.description: Exploratory programs for high school students focused on professional careers, college majors, and previewing college courses.

products.name: Social Media Management Tools
products.description: Tools designed to connect TV newsrooms with their audiences, provided by the television broadcasting segment.

products.name: Healthcare SaaS
products.description: Healthcare software-as-a-service technology offered through the company's healthcare segment.

products.name: Podcast Monetization Platform
products.description: SaaS platform enabling podcasters and media companies to monetize audio content through paid subscriptions, memberships, and audiobooks.

products.name: Slate and Foreign Policy Magazines
products.description: Media publications operated as part of the company's other businesses segment.
